name: Perform Color Deconvolution on Histology Image
description: You have access to Fiji with a histology sample image. Perform color deconvolution on the 'HeLa Cells (1.3M, 48-bit RGB)' sample image to separate the stain components. Save the first resulting channel (Colour_1) to ~/Fiji_Data/results/channel_1.png and the second resulting channel (Colour_2) to ~/Fiji_Data/results/channel_2.png. Record the measurement statistics for the first channel and save them to ~/Fiji_Data/results/channel_1_stats.csv.

metadata.application: Separating multiple stains in histology images
